item.title: Libraries, they can make amazing memories as well as everything else they do!! Such an amazing important service!
item.dc:creator: DumpingSh1tandBeingKind2

item.title: Daughter came too and wore a "Free Sis Hugs" tee. But she was more interested in the bounce house and food.
item.description: Might be time to retire the free hugs gear! I know there are still shitty and intolerant parents out there but their kids are in better hands with a much bigger and inclusive community. And with the younger generations being brought up in more accepting homes they don't need to run into the arms of strangers once a year at Pride. I've gladly given dad hugs every year since my daughter was born and even though I felt a little sad not getting many today, I reckon Pittsburgh is doing pretty well by way of their LGBTQ family members. Doesn't mean I'm not willing to share an embrace and a good cry if someone needs it, even if it's not June! Even if they're not gay! Lol.
item.dc:creator: MyWifesMohawk

item.title: My friendly friend died today. He was a good dog.
item.description:
RIP Grendel. Easter, 2015, Cottonport, Louisiana to June 1, 2025, in South Carolina. His grave is about 2 1/2 feet on a side, and 4 feet deep. It is the best I could do for him.
A picture from Christmas, 2024. I can see that he aged a lot in the last six months. I don't think I'll get another dog. I'm of the age that I don't want to bury another, and I don't want to leave one behind.
item.dc:creator: CEvonK

item.title: Did you know that Mormons believe black people turn white if they get into heaven?
item.dc:creator: pilomotor

item.title: My Synagogue’s Booth for Ferndale, MI Pride. LGBT+ Loving, Pro Palestine, Justice Forward!
item.description: I’m so proud of how my community showed up, and we had a blast doing it. We helped raise money for food aid in Gaza and spread the word that we are PROUDLY the queerest shul in metro Detroit! Front page edit: thanks all!!! It was a great day and we chatted with more incredible FANTASTICLY sparkly, beautiful people than I could count. Except one dude in an IDF t-shirt who did several scowly walk-bys - but he can go pound sand. Hope you enjoy your local Pride events!
item.dc:creator: bunniestbunny

item.title: Its so ALPHA, so MANLY...

item.title: I’ve been living in the Matrix
item.description: I’m a 30 year old man from a traditional Texan family, and I’ve gone my whole life not seeing it until I realized it all at once last night. I saw bits and pieces, but only conceded that very few men are sexist. I was thinking of the ones who are wife beaters, alcoholics, call women bitches or whores, or the rapists in jail. At the time, I viewed feminists as whining, complaining, overreacting, and being unfair toward good men. I went through an incel phase in my younger years being angry at women for rejecting me. Since then, I had a lot of maturing up to do. I improved myself and began getting dates online and girlfriends, but looking back, I never truly connected with them. I viewed the whole thing as a transactional competition and I was defensive because I was worried about what she was trying to use me for vs what I was wanting to get from her. It went on this way for a bit, and my male family members normalized saying “oh women” pejoratively. I legitimately did not trust women, and I sincerely believed it was normal that my romantic relationships would only last a year or so before ending. Then, at age 28, I reconnected with a female friend from my past, and she flew in from across the country to meet me. This girl was my only friend back in grade school and would sit with me at my empty lunch table. I remembered her fondly from those innocent days, and when we met up, she was confident and beautiful as ever. She showed me many things in life I hadn’t seen or noticed before, but I stress to you that she is not the one that changed my mind. No one person has. I met her family who was very welcoming and wholesome, unlike my family ever was. I learned real values from them. It was not any one person that changed my mind, and it was not propaganda either. All this time I’ve observed leftist people, and their propaganda, and all this time it has gone over my head. They came off to me as dramatic, sensitive, and vengeful. In recent years, I’ve kept to myself on politics because my social life was going too well and I had too much to lose, however, deep down, I didn’t care. I saw the cries for justice and activism, I saw the grievances and demands, but it just didn’t register with me. I just didn’t care. Now I’m 30, and I woke up in the middle of the night and it hit me like a ton of bricks. I finally connected the dots—That all these years, gender inequality and sexism has been atrocious and rampant and the fight has not been won. I don’t know what else to compare it to, but I’ll say this, it’s as bad as racism. This was a revelation to me, since I have always been sympathetic towards black people in terms of the reality of racism, but I would then look at women and wonder why they’re complaining since they have equal rights. Now…I can’t unsee it. The world I live in is a man’s world and not in a good way. It’s obviously bad for women, but it’s bad for men too! And the only reason we find ourselves in something like this is simply because it has always been this way. It’s not efficient, it’s not a good way to operate as a society, its shortcomings pop up big and obvious, time and time again. Clearly, the way men run things does keep the world turning and manages to get some things right, but that doesn’t mean that’s the way it should be done. The entire worldview is baked into these gender roles that are not good for men, not good for women, not good for anyone. And once I clear away the bullshit, the talk, the conjecture, and look at it for what it is, it’s plain to see that the way us men are behaving is not normal! it’s posturing, faking, regressing, repressing, and putting other people down. Obviously I know it’s not all men, but you see, just by accepting the male worldview, you’re already playing that game and that’s where it leads if you keep buying into it. Women actually behave normal! We need all people to look at things this way. What is wrong with people??? Now that I’ve realized this, I need to make some slight changes to myself and my own life, but I’m just so glad I see the world for what it is. Anyone have good advice for me on what is the right way to act in light of this? Right now it almost feels like one cannot be a man without being part of the problem. #gender #equality #feminism #sexism
item.dc:creator: everlastingfii8888

item.title: Well done sir!! This is the way!
item.dc:creator: DumpingSh1tandBeingKind2

item.title: Borowitz: Mexico Renames the Liberty Bell the TACO Bell
item.description: MEXICO CITY (The Borowitz Report)—In a move likely to stir controversy, Mexico has officially renamed the Liberty Bell “the TACO Bell,” the Mexican president announced on Monday. Effective immediately, the landmark will be referred to as the TACO Bell in all Mexican atlases, encyclopedias, and history textbooks, President Claudia Sheinbaum said. In her announcement, she gave Donald J. Trump “full credit” for the name change. “Thanks to Donald Trump, when one thinks of America, one no longer thinks of liberty,” she said. “One thinks of TACO.”
item.dc:creator: JasonM1

item.title: What Happened Today #122
item.description: ? Reality isn't just bending; our dystopia is now undeniable. Trump shares a post that Biden was "executed and replaced by clones" while Ernst jokes about constituents dying from Medicaid cuts, and somehow a terrorist with a flamethrower feels like just another Tuesday. This isn't political theater anymore. It's the systematic destruction of any shared understanding of what's real or acceptable. Meanwhile, don't rely on the algorithm. Let me send this free and private summary to you every night so that you never miss what's going on. Add your email on the homepage of GovBrief.today #GovBriefToday #Resist 1. https://go.govbrief.today/senators-warn-on-russia 2. https://go.govbrief.today/china-blasts-us 3. https://go.govbrief.today/lutnick-tariffs-staying 4. https://go.govbrief.today/hegseth-australia-spending 5. https://go.govbrief.today/hernandez-golden-twice 6. https://go.govbrief.today/colorado-fire-attack 7. https://go.govbrief.today/sanctuary-cities-list-removed 8. https://go.govbrief.today/ernst-doubles-down 9. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-unhinged-robot Yesterday - https://go.govbrief.today/palantir-us-database Fighting Back - https://go.govbrief.today/shattuck-everyday-resistance

item.title: Stellar SkyView: oceanwide.
item.description: Light pollution is a mainstay in most cities on the Planet. Sometimes I can see a few stars here and there, but usually they can be counted on my fingers. I'm looking up at the night sky right now, and there isn't a single visible star. But check out the ocean sky, out there, in the type of darkness that illuminates.
item.dc:creator: ArcadesCinza

item.title: The 511th vol. of "I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps - Pride Month 2025 ep 1
item.description:
I've been away for a while, but I'm back now! Four gay weeks of Pride Dumps and then back to my regular schedule of every other week!
If [Brand] only supports you at certain times, then [Brand] does not support you.
OC
Slightly different OC
OC
I realized/was informed in 2023 that I am actually bisexual. (I had just turned 39) Apparently, guys that are actually straight don't have a list of "just a couple of dudes they'd definitely fuck"
STAY TUNED! I'll be releasing more MeeMays back into the wild *every other* Monday-Friday around 11:30 am, GMT-5, in my ""I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so that I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps" Or use Imgur's "Follow" Feature, which will alert you either when I post or when I go Viral. If you wish to chat, I'm frequently in ElbowDeepInAHorse and PotatoCheesMonk's Discord Servers between the hours of 7pm and 1am GMT-5 during the week, and at unpredictable but frequent times Saturdays and Sundays. These are both VERY safe places for LGBTQIA+ people, if you need a community, please stop in! AbbiiStabbii's server is also amazing, *especially* safe for Trans folk.
My addition at the bottom
If only
I cannot stress this enough
Super Gay
"How do they know when they're done?" *whispers* "Who's gonna tell her?"
Unless we split the party!
OC Sorry Not Sorry
This is my newly commissioned Signature Image, by Dark Arts Studios. He's no longer on The Imgurs, I met him on ElbowDeepInAHorse's Discord Server. Here's where you can see his work: https://twitter.com/Anubis23342060 https://www.furaffinity.net/user/thed4rk1ord/ https://tailsofthegods.com/ https://dark-arts.itch.io/ FUN TIP / LIFE FACT / PRO HACK I upvote 90% - 99% of positive or neutral comments on my posts, as well as ≈50% of negative ones Archive Of Previous Dumps: Vols 1-300: https://imgur.com/a/vAfF9Wz Vols 301+ : https://imgur.com/a/oDakPaq Updated Whenever I Can Get Around To It #LGBTQIA #PrideMonth #Pride_Month #Pride #LGBTPride #Phone_Dump #Meme_Dump #Memes #MeeMays #AdolfHitlerSchoolForTheArts #TheWhoring20s #SaveTheBEEEEEES #BeeLM #SaveTheBees #JettfreyEpsfuelCandnt #CommeltSteelBeamicide #WhatIfNobodyShotJFK #AndHisHeadJustDidThat #EatingAppsTakingNaps #EatNamesAndTakeAss #MasturbatingIsNecrophilia #IfYoureDeadInside #DumpyMcGeeAndGuyNamedSteve #2Dumps1Site #AllTiddiesAreGoodTiddies #FreeTheNipple #GregFromHR #SteveFromAccounting #DougFromSales
